key.name: interval-seconds
key.description: Number of seconds between wallpaper changes.

key.name: include-subfolders
key.description: Recursively scan nested folders for images.

key.name: mirror-to-lock-screen
key.description: Apply the same wallpaper to the lock screen.

key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Show a panel icon with slideshow controls.

key.name: paused
key.description: Whether the slideshow is currently paused.

key.name: wallpaper-style
key.description: GNOME picture-options value used for the wallpaper.

key.name: refresh-token
key.description: Increment to force the slideshow to advance.
